MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Eisenman appeared via telephone for Vashner Boddie. Daniel Piccinini for and with Mikki Boddie.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 30, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 28, 2015. The status on the accounting and petition for removal of co-trustee, etc. were continued to and the Parties are to return on May 4, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties agreed to have the trustee ad litem deal with providing 24 hour notice of the inspection to the tenants. The parties also agreed to Mr. Piccinini preparing an amended order regarding suspension of his client specifying what acts she is able to perform. In addition, Mr. Piccinini was informed by the clerk that the accounting needs to be presented in the form of a petition pursuant to Probate Code 1060 in order to receive a hearing date. The accounting petition is to be filed by February 23, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To May-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Eisenman for and with Vashner Boddie (Petitioner). Daniel Piccinini for and with Mikki Boddie.

The Parties indicated that they have not discussed mediation, that at the last hearing they agreed to appointment of a Trustee Ad Litem ("TAL") to get the property sold, that there are issues with the accounting, that specific provisions were being requested by Mr. Piccinini (Court confirmation of sale; that the TAL not pick one of the six realtors the parties had selected) and that Ms. Boddie has raised the issue/claim of having the right to live in the premises for the rest of her life without paying rent. The Court will appoint Barbara De Vries as Trustee Ad Litem to sell the real property and record the correct deeds with bond in the amount of $1,100,000.00. The Court ordered Ms. Boddie to file an accounting for the period of March 5, 2010 through November 30, 2014 which is to include details of the refinance and all expenses of the real property. Said accounting is to conform with Probate Code 1060 and is to be filed no later than January 21, 2015. The Petition for Removal is also continued to January 21, 2015. Status on filing of the accounting was set for January 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on progress of sale of the property was set for February 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will not address/set a hearing on the issue of Ms. Boddie living rent free.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Continued To Dec-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Continued To Nov-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Eisenman appeared by telephone for Vashner Boddie. Daniel Piccinini for Mikki Boddie (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they were unable to agree on a property Broker. Mr. Eisenman stated that large sums of money were spent on the unit in which the Respondent resides and that the accounting is not complete. The Court stated that the accounting seems to be inadequate, that perhaps one of the Parties can petition to appoint a Trustee Ad Litem, that perhaps Mr. Eisenman can amend his petition to request an accounting and reminded Mr. Eisenman that he needs to file the missing exhibits. The Court also stated that it appears the Parties are never going to agree and that the money from the sale can go into a blocked account. The Petition for Removal or Co-Trustee, Suspension of Powers and Distribution of Assets was continued to November 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee, Suspension Of Powers & Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Eisenman for and with Vashner Boddie (Petitioner). Daniel Piccinini for and with Mikki Boddie (Objector).

The Parties indicated that they have had communication, that they talked about resolving the matter, that an accounting will be provided, that Mr. Piccinini's Client wants to buy the property, that two appraisals were done and that there is a significant difference between the appraisals. The Parties were asked to step out and discuss the matter. Upon returning, the Petition for Removal of Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to September 16, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to see if they can agree on a Broker and get the property listed. An informal accounting will be provided. Mr. Eisenman will appear by court call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
